en: Why do the nations rage and the peoples plot in vain?
zh: 列國為甚麼騷動？ 萬民為甚麼空謀妄想？

en: The kings of the earth set themselves, and the rulers take counsel together, against the LORD and against his anointed, saying,
zh: 世上的君王起來， 首領聚在一起， 敵對耶和華和他所膏立的，說：

en: "Let us burst their bonds apart and cast away their cords from us."
zh: “我們來掙斷他們給我們的束縛， 擺脫他們的繩索！”

en: He who sits in the heavens laughs; the Lord holds them in derision.
zh: 那坐在天上的必發笑， 主必譏笑他們。

en: Then he will speak to them in his wrath, and terrify them in his fury, saying,
zh: 那時，他必在烈怒中對他們講話， 在震怒中使他們驚慌，說：

en: "As for me, I have set my King on Zion, my holy hill."
zh: “我已經在錫安我的聖山上， 立了我的君王。”

en: I will tell of the decree: The LORD said to me, "You are my Son; today I have begotten you.
zh: 受膏者說：“我要宣告耶和華的諭旨： 耶和華對我說：‘你是我的兒子， 我今日生了你。

en: Ask of me, and I will make the nations your heritage, and the ends of the earth your possession.
zh: 你求我，我就把列國賜給你作產業， 把全地都歸屬於你。

en: You shall break them with a rod of iron and dash them in pieces like a potter's vessel."
zh: 你必用鐵杖擊打他們， 好像打碎陶器一樣粉碎他們。’”

en: Now therefore, O kings, be wise; be warned, O rulers of the earth.
zh: 現在，君王啊！你們要謹慎。 地上的審判官啊！你們應當聽勸告。

en: Serve the LORD with fear, and rejoice with trembling.
zh: 你們要以敬畏的態度事奉耶和華， 又應當存戰兢的心而歡呼。

en: Kiss the Son, lest he be angry, and you perish in the way, for his wrath is quickly kindled. Blessed are all who take refuge in him.
zh: 你們要用嘴親吻子， 否則他一發怒，你們就在路上滅亡， 因為他的怒氣快要發作。 凡是投靠他的，都是有福的。
